name: ASUS ROG STRIX Z790-H GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7800+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX Z790-H GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX premium gaming motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for enthusiasts.
